title: 2  Article 6 ECHR Analysis

3 Preliminary Analysis
This section provides some descriptive statistics and information on the data collected for this project.

title: 2  Article 6 ECHR Analysis
text:
3.2 Text Analysis
A few charts and tables providing some analysis on the textual corpus extracted.


Code
#load corpora and filter to olny use cases present in processed metadata
import json
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.ticker as mticker
from pathlib import Path

DATA  = Path("../../data")
PROC  = DATA / "processed_json"
THRESHOLD = 15  # chars; section present if length > THRESHOLD

def read_jsonl(path):
  with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
    return [json.loads(line) for line in f if line.strip()]

judg_raw  = read_jsonl(PROC / "echr_corpus.jsonl")
dec_raw   = read_jsonl(PROC / "echr_decisions_corpus.jsonl")

judg_meta = pd.read_json(DATA / "art_6_judgments_metadata_processed.json", lines=True)[["itemid", "court_level"]]
dec_meta  = pd.read_json(DATA / "art_6_decisions_metadata_processed.json",  lines=True)[["itemid", "court_level"]]

judg_ids = set(judg_meta["itemid"].astype(str))
dec_ids  = set(dec_meta["itemid"].astype(str))

judg_df = pd.DataFrame([r for r in judg_raw if str(r.get("itemid", "")) in judg_ids])
dec_df  = pd.DataFrame([r for r in dec_raw  if str(r.get("itemid", "")) in dec_ids])
judg_df["itemid"] = judg_df["itemid"].astype(str)
dec_df["itemid"]  = dec_df["itemid"].astype(str)

print(f"Judgment Text: {len(judg_df):,}  |  Decision Text: {len(dec_df):,}")


Judgment Text: 15,305  |  Decision Text: 33,019




Code
#section coverage
JUDG_SECTIONS = ["introduction", "procedure", "facts", "legal_framework", "law", "reasons"]
DEC_SECTIONS  = ["introduction", "facts", "legal_framework", "law", "reasons"]
SECTION_LABELS = {
  "introduction":    "Introduction",
  "procedure":       "Procedure",
  "facts":           "Facts",
  "legal_framework": "Legal Framework",
  "law":             "Law",
  "reasons":         "Reasons",
  "appendix":        "Appendix",
}

def section_pct(df, sections):
  n = len(df)
  return {
    s: 100 * (df["text_chunks"].apply(lambda c: len((c or {}).get(s, "") or "")) > THRESHOLD).sum() / n
    for s in sections
  }

judg_cov = section_pct(judg_df, JUDG_SECTIONS)
dec_cov  = section_pct(dec_df,  DEC_SECTIONS)

fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(13, 5))
for ax, cov, sections, title in [
  (ax1, judg_cov, JUDG_SECTIONS, "Judgments"),
  (ax2, dec_cov,  DEC_SECTIONS,  "Decisions"),
]:
  lbls = [SECTION_LABELS[s] for s in sections]
  vals = [cov[s] for s in sections]
  bars = ax.bar(lbls, vals, color="steelblue", width=0.6)
  ax.set_ylim(0, 112)
  ax.set_ylabel("Cases with section present (%)")
  ax.set_title(title)
  ax.tick_params(axis="x", rotation=30)
  for bar, v in zip(bars, vals):
    ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width() / 2, v + 1, f"{v:.0f}%",
        ha="center", va="bottom", fontsize=9)

fig.suptitle("Section Coverage by Corpus", fontsize=13)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()











Code
#attach court level labels
LEVEL_LABELS = {
  # Judgments
  "CHAMBER":          "Chamber",
  "GRANDCHAMBER":     "Grand Chamber",
  "COMMITTEE":        "Committee",
  # Decisions
  "ADMISSIBILITY":    "Admissibility (Chamber)",
  "ADMISSIBILITYCOM": "Admissibility (Committee)",
  "DECGRANDCHAMBER":  "Admissibility (Grand Chamber)",
  "DECCOMMISSION":    "Admissibility (Other)",
}

def attach_level(df, meta):
  merged = df.merge(meta.astype({"itemid": str}), on="itemid", how="left")
  is_screening = merged["court_level"].astype(str).str.contains("SCREENING", case=False, na=False)
  merged["level_label"] = merged["court_level"].map(LEVEL_LABELS).fillna(merged["court_level"])
  merged.loc[is_screening, "level_label"] = "Admissibility (Other)"
  return merged

judg_df = attach_level(judg_df, judg_meta)
dec_df  = attach_level(dec_df,  dec_meta)

# Sanity-check: print any court_level values not covered by the map
unmapped_j = judg_df.loc[~judg_df["court_level"].isin(LEVEL_LABELS), "court_level"].unique()
unmapped_d = dec_df.loc[~dec_df["court_level"].isin(LEVEL_LABELS),  "court_level"].unique()




Code
#full-text length analysis by corpus and court level
judg_df["text_len"] = judg_df["full_text"].fillna("").str.len()
dec_df["text_len"]  = dec_df["full_text"].fillna("").str.len()

#summary table
pd.options.display.float_format = "{:,.0f}".format
display(pd.DataFrame({
  "Corpus":  ["Judgments", "Decisions"],
  "N":       [len(judg_df), len(dec_df)],
  "Mean":    [judg_df["text_len"].mean(), dec_df["text_len"].mean()],
  "Median":  [judg_df["text_len"].median(), dec_df["text_len"].median()],
  "Std":     [judg_df["text_len"].std(), dec_df["text_len"].std()],
}))

#corpus x court
def level_summary(df, label):
  grp = (df.groupby("level_label")["text_len"]
       .agg(N="count", Mean="mean", Median="median", Std="std")
       .round(0).reset_index()
       .rename(columns={"level_label": "Level"}))
  grp.insert(0, "Corpus", label)
  return grp

display(pd.concat([level_summary(judg_df, "Judgments"),
           level_summary(dec_df,  "Decisions")], ignore_index=True))

fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(13, 5))
for ax, df, title in [(ax1, judg_df, "Judgments"), (ax2, dec_df, "Decisions")]:
  grp = df.groupby("level_label")["text_len"].mean().sort_values(ascending=False)
  ax.bar(grp.index, grp.values, color="steelblue")
  ax.set_title(title)
  ax.set_ylabel("Mean full-text length (chars)")
  ax.tick_params(axis="x", rotation=25)
  ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(mticker.FuncFormatter(lambda x, _: f"{x/1000:.0f}k"))

fig.suptitle("Average Full-Text Length by Court Level", fontsize=13)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Code
#type x segment analysis
SECTIONS_ALL = ["introduction", "procedure", "facts", "legal_framework", "law", "reasons", "appendix"]

def segment_stats(df, label):
  rows = []
  for s in SECTIONS_ALL:
    lengths = df["text_chunks"].apply(lambda c: len((c or {}).get(s, "") or ""))
    nonempty = lengths[lengths > THRESHOLD]
    rows.append({
      "Corpus":        label,
      "Section":       SECTION_LABELS.get(s, s),
      "N (non-empty)": len(nonempty),
      "% present":     round(100 * len(nonempty) / len(df), 1),
      "Mean (chars)":  round(nonempty.mean(), 0) if len(nonempty) else 0,
      "Median (chars)": round(nonempty.median(), 0) if len(nonempty) else 0,
    })
  return pd.DataFrame(rows)

display(pd.concat([segment_stats(judg_df, "Judgments"),
           segment_stats(dec_df,  "Decisions")], ignore_index=True))

fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))
for ax, df, label in [(ax1, judg_df, "Judgments"), (ax2, dec_df, "Decisions")]:
  data, xlabels = [], []
  for s in SECTIONS_ALL:
    lengths = df["text_chunks"].apply(lambda c: len((c or {}).get(s, "") or ""))
    nonempty = lengths[lengths > THRESHOLD]
    if len(nonempty) > 0:
      data.append(nonempty.values)
      xlabels.append(SECTION_LABELS.get(s, s))
  ax.boxplot(data, tick_labels=xlabels, patch_artist=True,
         boxprops=dict(facecolor="steelblue", alpha=0.6),
         medianprops=dict(color="navy"),
         flierprops=dict(marker=".", markersize=2, alpha=0.3))
  ax.set_title(f"{label} — segment lengths (non-empty only)")
  ax.set_ylabel("Length (chars)")
  ax.tick_params(axis="x", rotation=30)
  ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(mticker.FuncFormatter(lambda x, _: f"{x/1000:.0f}k"))

fig.suptitle("Segment Length Distribution by Corpus", fontsize=13)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
